name: An Uncommon Pasta Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Sun-dried tomato halves; no oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté onion in oil for 5 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, combine water and tomatoes in a bowl; set aside for 2 to 3 minutes.
3. With a slotted spoon, remove and set aside 1/3 of the tomatoes.
4. In an electric blender or food processor, puree the remaining tomato/water mixture and garlic.
5. Add the puree and reserved tomato halves to the skillet.
6. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer gently for 10 minutes.
7. Stir in the remaining ingredients; simmer for 1 minute.
8. Remove from heat. Serve over your choice of hot cooked pasta and sprinkle with Parmesan.
